info.title: Simeis
info.description:
Simeis is a game player with an API
To play, you must start by creating a player with `/player/new/{name}`
The key you get from this API must be passed to each request as a HTTP header of key "Simeis-Key"

200.description: The messasge "pong"

get.summary: Test the connection to the server

200.description: The list of events that occured for this player on the server

get.summary: Get the logs from the server

200.description: the version of the game

get.summary: Get the version of the game

get.description:
Informations returned:
- Volume in cargo
- Base market price
- If extractable, its difficulty
- If extractable, the minimum rank of the operator required

200.description: For each resource, returns basic informations

get.summary: Get informations on all the resources on game

200.description: The game statistics for each player currently in the game

get.summary: Get the stats of the game, about all players

200.description: The price for each resource

get.summary: Get prices of each resources on the market

get.description: Depends on the level of the trader

200.description: The fee rate

get.summary: Get the fee rate applied on the market of a station

200.description: How much was added to the cargo, how much money was removed, and the amount of fees

post.summary: Buy a specific resource on the market

200.description: How much was removed from the cargo, how much money was added, and the amount of fees

post.summary: Sell a specific resource on the market

200.description: Information about the player, complete if it's you, minimal if it's another player

get.summary: Get the status from the player of a given id.

post.description: The secret key must be used in the "Simeis-Key" HTTP header

200.description: The ID of the player, and its authentication secret key

post.summary: Creates a new player in the game

200.description: The data for the ship

get.summary: Get the status of the ship

200.description: The amount of credits consumed each second by the crew of this ship

get.summary: Compute how much wages cost per second for this ship

200.description: Travel informations on this destination

get.summary: Compute how much will cost a travel to a specific position (X, Y, Z)

post.description: Ship will have the state InFlight during the travel

200.description: Travel informations on the destination

post.summary: Navigate to position (X, Y, Z)

200.description: The position where the ship has stopped

post.summary: Stop the naviguation, ship will become Idle, and stay in place

post.description: Ship will have the state "Extracting" until its cargo is full

200.description: The rate at which every resources are mined, and the time necessary to fill the cargo

post.summary: Start the extraction of resources on the planet

200.description: Nothing

post.summary: Stop the extraction of resources on the planet, the ship state will be Idle

200.description: How much of each resource were unloaded, and if the ship cargo is empty or not

post.summary: Unload the whole cargo of a ship into a station

post.description: Depending on the cargo space available on the station, may not unload anything

200.description: How much of this resource was effectively unloaded from the ship

post.summary: Unload a specific amount of a specific resource on the station's storage

200.description: All the informations for the player on this station

get.summary: Get status of a station

200.description: List of the upgrades available, and their price

get.summary: List the upgrades for a station currently available

200.description: Scan information on all the stellar objects around this station

post.summary: Scan for planets around the station

200.description: How much fuel was effectively added to the ship (and removed from the station cargo)

post.summary: Use fuel in storage on the station to refuel the ship

200.description: How much hull was effectively used to repair the ship (and removed from the station cargo)

post.summary: Use the hull plates in storage on the station to repair the ship

200.description: For each ship, its statistics, and price

get.summary: List all the ships available for buying

200.description: The price of every upgrade available

get.summary: List all upgrades available for buying on a specific ship, on the station

200.description: The ID of the ship you just bought

post.summary: Buy a ship from the station's shop

200.description: The cost of the upgrade

post.summary: Buy an upgrade and install it on a ship

200.description: For each member, his type, rank, and price for next rank

get.summary: List all the upgrades available for the crew of a specific ship

200.description: The ID of the hired crew member

post.summary: Hire a new crew member on the station. Unless assigned, it will stay idle

200.description: New rank, and cost of the upgrade

post.summary: Upgrade a crew member of a specific ship

200.description: New rank, and cost of the upgrade

post.summary: Upgrade a crew member of the station

post.description: The level of the trader will affect the fee rate applied on the market

200.description: Nothing

post.summary: Assign a crew member as a trader on a station.

post.description: The level of the pilot will affect the speed of the ship, as well as it's fuel consumption

200.description: Nothing

post.summary: Assign a crew member as a pilot on a ship.

post.description: The level of the crew member will affect the extraction rate of the resources

200.description: Nothing

post.summary: Assign a crew member as an operator on a ship.

post.description: The level of the crew member will affect the production rate

200.description: Nothing

post.summary: Assign a crew member as an operator on an industry unit of a sttion.

200.description: For each module, its price

get.summary: List all the modules available to buy on the station

get.summary: List the available upgrades for a module on a ship

post.description: The level of a module will affect the extraction rate for a resource, as well as what kind of resources it kind mine.

200.description: The new rank of the module, and the cost of the upgrade

post.summary: Buy an upgrade for a module installed on a ship

200.description: The cargo of the station

200.description: The price for each unit

get.summary: List all the industry units available to buy on the station

200.description: The resources needed in input of the unit, and the one produced in the output

post.description: Unless started, an industry unit will NOT produce anything

200.description: Nothing

post.summary: Start an industry unit

200.description: Nothing
